lines.english: Had the writer's money been stolen?
lines.raw: Had the writer's money been stolen? | 作者的钱被偷了吗？

lines.english: I entered the hotel manager's office and sat down.
lines.chinese: 我走进旅馆经理的办公室，坐了下来。
lines.raw: I entered the hotel manager's office and sat down. | 我走进旅馆经理的办公室，坐了下来。

lines.english: I had just lost ￡50 and I felt very upset.
lines.chinese: 我刚刚丢失了50英镑，感到非常沮丧。
lines.raw: I had just lost ￡50 and I felt very upset. | 我刚刚丢失了50英镑，感到非常沮丧。

lines.english: 'I left the money in my room,' I said, 'and it's not there now. '
lines.chinese: “我把钱落在房间里了，”我说，“现在它不在那儿了。”
lines.raw: 'I left the money in my room,' I said, 'and it's not there now. ' | “我把钱落在房间里了，”我说，“现在它不在那儿了。”

lines.english: The manager was sympathetic, but he could do nothing.
lines.chinese: 经理深表同情，但他无能为力。
lines.raw: The manager was sympathetic, but he could do nothing. | 经理深表同情，但他无能为力。

lines.english: 'Everyone's losing money these days,' he said.
lines.raw: 'Everyone's losing money these days,' he said. | “现在大家都在丢钱，”他说。

lines.english: He started to complain about this wicked world but was interrupted by a knock at the door.
lines.chinese: 他开始抱怨这个邪恶的世界，但被一阵敲门声打断了。
lines.raw: He started to complain about this wicked world but was interrupted by a knock at the door. | 他开始抱怨这个邪恶的世界，但被一阵敲门声打断了。

lines.english: A girl came in and put an envelope on his desk.
lines.chinese: 一个女孩走了进来，在他的桌上放了一个信封。
lines.raw: A girl came in and put an envelope on his desk. | 一个女孩走了进来，在他的桌上放了一个信封。
It contained ￡50. | 里面装着50英镑。

lines.english: 'I found this outside this gentleman's room,' she said.
lines.chinese: “我在这位先生的房间外面发现了这个，”她说。
lines.raw: 'I found this outside this gentleman's room,' she said. | “我在这位先生的房间外面发现了这个，”她说。

lines.english: 'Well,' I said to the manager,'there is still some honesty in this world!'
lines.chinese: “噢，”我对经理说，“这世界上还是有诚实可言的！”
lines.raw: 'Well,' I said to the manager,'there is still some honesty in this world!' | “噢，”我对经理说，“这世界上还是有诚实可言的！”
